message:
style(config): rustfmt import ordering and add TerminalSettings to test imports

Reorder test imports alphabetically (Config, ExtensionRiskConfig,
SettingsScope, TerminalSettings before function imports) per rustfmt
conventions. Add TerminalSettings import needed by the camelCase
alias tests added in the previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
